title: FEMS acceptance replay eval (FEMS-EVAL-001.4) (folded WP-1-FEMS-Acceptance-Replay-Eval)
goal: Define and enforce deterministic acceptance/validation replay for FEMS so a past MemoryPack composition can be reconstructed exactly and re-evaluated. Folded from WP-1-FEMS-Acceptance-Replay-Eval. Critical for the self-improvement loop's reproducibility story and the integration validator's audit path.
expected_diff_shape: New module src/backend/handshake_core/src/memory/replay_eval.rs (ReplayEvaluator + ReplayRequest + ReplayResult + ReplayDifference types). Tests src/backend/handshake_core/tests/replay_eval_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-141 (MemoryCapsule), MT-145 (CapsuleRecord persistence), MT-157 (bitemporal indexing - replay needs both temporal axes).
implementation_notes: Per WP-1-FEMS-Acceptance-Replay-Eval preserved_intent: 'Define and enforce deterministic acceptance/validation for FEMS Phase 1 delivery'. Per refinement D.3 'acceptance replay eval'. ReplayRequest: `{ capsule_id: Uuid, replay_as_of: AsOfQuery (from MT-157), expected_source_hash: String }`. ReplayResult: `{ replayed_capsule: MemoryCapsule, replay_difference: ReplayDifference, replay_succeeded: bool }`. ReplayDifference: `{ items_present_now_absent_then: Vec<Uuid>, items_absent_now_present_then: Vec<Uuid>, items_with_different_scores: Vec<(Uuid, f64, f64)> }`. ReplayEvaluator: `pub fn replay(req: ReplayRequest, recorder: &dyn CapsuleRecordReader, bitemporal: &dyn BitemporalAccessor, builder: &CapsuleBuilder) -> Result<ReplayResult, ReplayError>`. Flow: (1) load original CapsuleRecord via recorder, (2) use bitemporal.items_visible_at(replay_as_of) to recover the world state at original build time, (3) re-run CapsuleBuilder against that frozen world state with the original RetrievalPolicy, (4) compare resulting capsule to original by source_hash (exact match) and diff item-level if mismatch. replay_succeeded = (source_hash matches). Use this to validate (a) bitemporal indexing is correct, (b) CapsuleBuilder is deterministic given fixed inputs, (c) self-improvement-loop iterations can be exactly reproduced from EventLedger. Tests: replay of just-built capsule succeeds with empty ReplayDifference; replay after a hygiene invalidation detects the diff (item absent now present then); replay with wrong expected_source_hash returns ReplayError::HashMismatch; replay is deterministic across multiple invocations.
risk_if_missed: Without replay eval the self-improvement loop cannot prove reproducibility and the integration validator cannot audit past loop iterations.
validator_focus: Replay is deterministic; ReplayDifference surfaces every divergence; bitemporal accessor is the source of truth for as-of state.

minimum_controls: Replay is deterministic given fixed AsOfQuery; non-determinism is a test failure.
ReplayDifference enumerates every divergence so diffs can be inspected.
Bitemporal accessor is the sole source of as-of state; replay cannot accidentally consume current FEMS state.
